result:
Build succeeded — `wpa_supplicant`, `wpa_cli`, and `wpa_passphrase` all linked cleanly (only a pre-existing unrelated warning remains). All 5 compile errors fixed at their root cause:

1. `src/utils/eloop.c:615` — `timeout->time.seconds` → `.sec` (wrong field name)
2. `wpa_supplicant/config_file.c:29` — `os_strlength` → `os_strlen` (typo, undeclared function)
3. `src/rsn_supp/wpa.c:103` — `sm->pairwise_ciph` → `sm->pairwise_cipher` (typo)
4. `wpa_supplicant/events.c:132` — `wpa_s->cur_ssid` → `wpa_s->current_ssid` (wrong field name)
5. `wpa_supplicant/scan.c:1137` — added missing `NULL` `user_data` arg to `eloop_register_timeout`, matching its 5-arg signature and the pattern used elsewhere in the file
